segments.text: Bounced off the shield—that doesn't combo
segments.original_text: ブロックに跳ねてここは逆にコンボになりませんでした
ですが火力は十分ですよ

segments.text: Up to 100% in a flash, then the bair!
segments.original_text: あっという間に100%そして空中後ろ

full_text: Bounced off the shield—that doesn't combo But the damage is solid Up to 100% in a flash, then the bair!
